generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components (model artifacts used as data sources)
instance SysMLDiagram : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "SysML diagram capturing high‑level requirements, functional architecture, and system behavior as part of the MBSE approach."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SysMLDiagramDataTransmitted
]

instance ADLComponentDefinition : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "ADL component‑connector definition derived from SysML models for hardware/software architecture."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ADLDefinitionDataTransmitted
]

instance SimulinkSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model generated from ADL component definitions to execute physics‑based behavior."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulinkSimulationDataTransmitted
]

instance CppImplementationArtifact : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "C++ implementation artifact produced from Simulink or ADL models for executable deployment."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CppCodeDataTransmitted
]

instance JavaImplementationArtifact : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Java implementation artifact produced from Simulink or ADL models for executable deployment."
    DTDFVocab:producedData JavaCodeDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance SysMLDiagramDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SysMLDiagram
]

instance ADLDefinitionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ADLComponentDefinition
]

instance SimulinkSimulationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSimulationModel
]

instance CppCodeDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CppImplementationArtifact
]

instance JavaCodeDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom JavaImplementationArtifact
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLModelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured model data extracted from SysML diagram."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolchain
    DTDFVocab:fromData SysMLDiagramDataTransmitted
]

instance ADLModelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "ADL model data representing component connections."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ADLToolchain
    DTDFVocab:fromData ADLDefinitionDataTransmitted
]

instance SimulinkResultData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation result data produced by Simulink execution."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkSimulationDataTransmitted
]

instance CppBinaryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Compiled C++ binary ready for deployment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppCompilerTool
    DTDFVocab:fromData CppCodeDataTransmitted
]

instance JavaBytecodeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Java bytecode generated for runtime execution."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JavaRuntimeTool
    DTDFVocab:fromData JavaCodeDataTransmitted
]

// C11: Enablers (tooling and methodologies)
instance SysMLToolchain : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Toolchain (e.g., Cameo Systems Modeler) that processes SysML model data."
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelTransformationService
]

instance ADLToolchain : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ADL processing tool (e.g., AADL2) that transforms ADL model data."
    DTDFVocab:enables ADLModelTransformationService
]

instance SimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink execution engine that runs simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationExecutionService
]

instance CppCompilerTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ compiler (e.g., GCC) that builds binary from source code."
    DTDFVocab:enables CppCodeGenerationService
]

instance JavaRuntimeTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java runtime environment (e.g., OpenJDK) that packages bytecode."
    DTDFVocab:enables JavaCodeGenerationService
]

instance RFLPMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics) guiding model development."
    DTDFVocab:enables MethodologyGuidedModelingService
]

instance OOSEMMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology structuring object‑oriented system engineering."
    DTDFVocab:enables MethodologyGuidedModelingService
]

instance SPESMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology supporting systematic engineering of physical‑software systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables MethodologyGuidedModelingService
]

instance SMArDTMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for smart digital twin development."
    DTDFVocab:enables MethodologyGuidedModelingService
]

// C6: Services
instance SysMLModelTransformationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that transforms SysML model data into intermediate representations."
    DTDFVocab:provides SysMLDesignInsight
]

instance ADLModelTransformationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that converts ADL model data into executable component descriptions."
    DTDFVocab:provides ADLDesignInsight
]

instance SimulationExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that executes Simulink models and generates simulation results."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance CppCodeGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that compiles C++ source code into binary artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:provides CppCompilationAction
]

instance JavaCodeGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that packages Java bytecode for deployment."
    DTDFVocab:provides JavaDeploymentAction
]

instance MethodologyGuidedModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that applies engineering methodologies to guide model creation."
    DTDFVocab:provides MethodologyGuidanceInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance SysMLDesignInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from SysML models about requirement fulfillment and functional allocation."
]

instance ADLDesignInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight obtained from ADL models regarding component connectivity and interface consistency."
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight extracted from simulation results, indicating system performance under modeled physics."
]

instance MethodologyGuidanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Guidance insight provided by applied engineering methodologies (RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, SMArDT)."
]

instance CppCompilationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic compilation of C++ source into executable binary."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance JavaDeploymentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic packaging and deployment of Java bytecode."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The document outlines a Model‑Based Systems‑Engineering (MBSE) lifecycle that is split into successive abstraction levels: (i) requirements modeling, (ii) functional architecture modeling, (iii) logical architecture modeling, and (iv) product/technical (physical) layer modeling. At each stage the Digital Twin is represented by different artifacts – SysML requirement diagrams for the requirements phase, SysML internal block diagrams (IBDs) for functional and logical structures, Architecture Description Language (ADL) component‑connector specifications such as ACME, AADL or MontiArc for logical composition, and finally executable simulation models (e.g., MATLAB/Simulink) or source code (C++, Java) for the physical implementation. Transition between phases is managed via traceability links that connect requirements to functional blocks, logical components to code, although explicit governance mechanisms are not detailed in the document."
]
